summary: Iteration 9 Major UI Rebuild Testing Complete. All features verified: (1) Login page - full background image with dark overlay, 'Restez connecter!' title, transparent rounded inputs with person/lock icons, blue Connexion button (#0F056B), QR code, JAPAP header bar, (2) Feed page - cover photo + circular avatar + username, pill-shaped tabs (Photos active=blue, Videos, Groupes, Suivies), 'Quoi de neuf?' placeholder, Publier button, posts with avatar/name/text/like/comment/share, (3) Mobile - blue header (#0F056B) with logo/search/bell notification badge/menu, blue bottom nav (#0F056B) with white icons, (4) Desktop - dark blue sidebar (#0B0542) with red active nav (#E01C2E). 21/21 backend tests passed. All functionality preserved after UI redesign.
critical_code_review_comments: Login Page: Full background image (friends at sunset) with dark gradient overlay, 'Restez connecter!' title, transparent rounded inputs with User/Lock icons, blue Connexion button (#0F056B), QR code section, blue header/footer bars

Feed Page: Cover photo + circular avatar overlapping, user name + @username, pill-shaped tabs (Photos/Videos/Groupes/Suivies) with blue active state, 'Quoi de neuf?' placeholder, Publier button, posts with avatar/name/text/like/comment/share actions
Mobile Header: Blue (#0F056B) with JAPAP logo, search icon, bell with notification badge (5), hamburger menu
Mobile Bottom Nav: Blue (#0F056B) with white icons for Accueil/Messenger/Wallet/Services/Profil
Desktop Sidebar: Dark blue (#0B0542) background, white inverted logo, red active nav items (#E01C2E)
All navigation working: Feed, Messenger/Chat, Wallet, Services, Profile, Admin (for admin users)
Post creation working: New posts appear immediately in feed
Wallet operations working: Shows balance, deposit/withdraw buttons, transaction history
seed_data_creation: None - using existing data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 verified major UI rebuild matching phone screenshots. Login page: full background image with overlay, transparent inputs, blue Connexion button. Feed page: cover photo + avatar + pill tabs. Mobile: blue header/bottom nav. Desktop: dark blue sidebar with red active nav. All colors verified: #0F056B (primary blue), #0B0542 (sidebar dark blue), #E01C2E (red/secondary). Backend unchanged - 21 tests still passing.
